text:
There’s a small pond near my hometown. The water there is crystal-clear, a perfect spot for a little fish named Muffin.

One sunny morning, Muffin was playing near the edge when a curious butterfly landed on him. The butterfly was magnificent, with bright orange wings covered in tiny, shimmering gold spots. The two became fast friends.

As they played happily, a curious cat decided to investigate the pond’s edge. Muffin was nervous but brave. He did a little floaty dive into the pond. When the cat saw Muffin surfacing nearby, it meowed in surprise.

Muffin floated to the pond’s rim, waved his wings, and chirped happily. The cat watched for a moment then walked away, amazed.

Every day after that, whenever the cat gazed at the sky, it would think fondly of Muffin the flying fish. And Muffin? Well, he just continued playing like nothing had happened.

And so
